name: Connecticut DCP eLicense Home Improvement Contractor Lookup
updateFrequency: unknown; verify against the Connecticut eLicense portal before relying on freshness assumptions
licenseTypesIncluded: Connecticut licenses, permits, and registrations exposed by DCP/eLicense lookup, including home improvement contractor registrations where available
knownExclusions: The eLicense portal covers many license and registration types and this source entry does not isolate every construction-relevant credential.
Local permits, municipal registrations, and non-DCP authorizations are outside this source entry.
Roster generation is referenced by the official page, but bulk-export terms and fixture-safe fields require future review.
rateLimitNotes: No adapter is implemented. Prefer official roster/export mechanisms if confirmed before lookup automation.
publicRecordsNotes: Official lookup source metadata only. Absence from this source is not proof that a license, permit, or registration does not exist elsewhere.
officialBulkDownloadNotes: The official DCP page links to eLicense roster generation, but no redistribution-safe bulk path is confirmed in this phase.
researchNotes: Registry-only source for Connecticut DCP/eLicense lookup. Future work should narrow home improvement contractor fields and roster terms before adapter work.
maintainerNotes: Keep the broad eLicense scope explicit and avoid treating all eLicense professions as construction records.

researchEvidence.note: Official public source, access shape, and current automation constraints reviewed.

blocker.summary: No stable, documented machine-readable official interface is currently suitable for an offline-tested adapter.
